reviews.comment:
Ubicado en pleno centro de Santa Rosa.
Estacion de servicios,Lubricentro,mas el Full que ofrece cafe,desayunos y comidas rapidas,ademas de un store surtido.
De destacar,alli podes inflar tu bici para dar  un paseo o llevarte del FUll un cafe take away,si queres pasear a pie.

(Translated by Google)
Located in the heart of Santa Rosa.
It's a gas station, a lube shop, and a convenience store offering coffee, breakfast, and fast food, as well as a well-stocked shop.
Notably, you can inflate your bicycle tires there for a ride or grab a coffee to go from the convenience store if you prefer to explore on foot.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/9430649401884021116/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNVLUkzQmtnRRAB

reviews.comment:
Buena atención. A veces lenta. Ahora 02/20 agregaron pago a través de la app de YPF lo que facilita mucho y permite no tener que andar con todas las tarjetas encima.

(Translated by Google)
Good service. Sometimes slow. Now, on February 20th, they added payment through the YPF app, which makes things much easier and eliminates the need to carry all your cards around.

reviews.comment:
Mala atención!! Y poca predisposición de parte de los empleados del full!! Siempre excusas para no hacer hamburguesas, siendo que su slogan es comida las 24 hs. No lo recomiendo

(Translated by Google)
Terrible service! And the staff at Full were incredibly unhelpful! They always made excuses for not serving burgers, even though their slogan is "24-hour food." I don't recommend it.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/9430649401884021116/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNzbDhpWlJ3EAE
